criteria.name: correct_classification
criteria.description: Classifies the comment as ACTIONABLE_FIX (missing resource limits is a real correctness/safety issue that must be fixed)

criteria.name: correct_yaml
criteria.description: Provides corrected YAML with both resources.requests (cpu, memory) and resources.limits (memory) set. CPU limit is intentionally omitted or justified — CPU limits cause throttling.

criteria.name: blast_radius
criteria.description: Mentions blast radius: pods may be throttled or rescheduled if requests are set higher than current actual usage; rolling update will replace pods one by one.

criteria.name: rollback_plan
criteria.description: Provides a rollback approach: revert the manifest and re-apply, or use kubectl rollout undo.

criteria.name: reply_quality
criteria.description: The review thread reply is concise, references the specific file and change, and ends with the appropriate resolution marker (✅ Fixed).
